title: Add domain persona to project
story: As a framework user, I want to drop a persona file in .isdlc/personas/ so that the next roundtable analysis includes that domain perspective without any configuration.

title: Get security review during analysis
story: As a framework user, I want the roundtable to automatically include a security reviewer when my issue involves authentication or input validation, so that security concerns surface during analysis rather than at code review.

title: Confirm or amend persona roster
story: As a framework user, I want to see which personas the framework proposes for my analysis and be able to add or remove perspectives before the roundtable begins.

title: Get bulleted conclusions instead of conversation
story: As a framework user, I want to see concise domain-labeled conclusion bullets instead of a full conversation between personas, so that I can review analysis output faster.

title: Set project-level roundtable preferences
story: As a framework customizer, I want to set verbosity mode and default personas in a config file so that my team's preferences apply to every analysis automatically.

title: Override a built-in persona
story: As a framework customizer, I want to override a shipped persona by placing a file with the same name in .isdlc/personas/ so that I can tailor the persona's voice and focus to my project's needs.

title: Get notified when shipped persona updates
story: As a framework customizer who has overridden a persona, I want to be notified when the framework ships a newer version so that I can review improvements and update my override if needed.

title: Late-join persona mid-conversation
story: As a framework user, I want the roundtable to invite a relevant persona mid-conversation when the discussion shifts to a new domain, so that I get expert perspective without restarting the analysis.

title: Create custom domain expert
story: As a framework customizer, I want to use the blank Domain Expert template to create a persona for my project's specific domain (e.g., healthcare compliance, fintech regulations), so that analysis includes my domain's unique constraints.
